Document:
# No shock content This is a zero tolerance rule.
Things that appear to be intended to or are likely to disturb players out of character are considered shock content and are not allowed. This includes gore, real-world tragedies, and other disturbing themes presented for shock value.
## Examples Prohibited: - Emoting defecation or related acts. - Sharing or referencing disturbing real-world imagery or events. - Roleplay or emotes intended to disgust or disturb other players out of character.
